speaker: speaker2
text: I do ! My favorites are Mexican , Thai , and Indian .

speaker: speaker1
text: Really ? Have you ever tried Moroccan ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I can't say that I have . What are the basic ingredients ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't know . A friend of mine said I should try it .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you know where a Moroccan restaurant is ?

speaker: speaker1
text: As a matter of fact , he gave me this address .

speaker: speaker2
text: Let's go there for lunch ! I'm up for an adventure !
